name: Grilled Angel Food Cake with Nectarines & Blueberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the grill and cover to build intense heat.
2. Remove nectarine pits and slice each one into 6 pieces.
3. In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, lemon zest, and lemon juice.
4. Place 6 nectarine slices on a skewer and place them on the grill.
5. Cook for 5 minutes, turning and basting with glaze.
6. Continue cooking and basting for another 7 minutes until the fruit is just about done.
7. Toast cake slices on a cooler part of the grill, turning once.
8. Serve toasted cake with grilled nectarines and blueberries.
